hypothesis.name: optimistic_nonblocking_io_before_readiness_wait
hypothesis.summary: In ylong_runtime AsyncSource::poll_io, try the nonblocking socket operation once before waiting for reactor readiness; if it returns WouldBlock, fall back to the original poll_ready and clear_readiness loop.
hypothesis.expected_effect: Avoid readiness-bit and waker registration overhead when nested TLS data is already available before the reactor readiness bit is observed.
hypothesis.semantic_constraint: No HTTP proxy, CONNECT, TLS, mTLS, certificate verification, request validation, response validation, or libcurl baseline semantics may change.

temporary_candidate_changes: Copied the Cargo.lock-pinned commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime source into ylong_http_client/vendor/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime for a reproducible branch-local test.
Temporarily added a workspace [patch."https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git"] section pointing ylong_runtime, ylong_io, and ylong_runtime_macros to the vendored source.
Temporarily patched ylong_runtime/src/net/async_source.rs so AsyncSource::poll_io attempted f() once before the existing readiness-first loop.
Applied a minimal vendored-source compatibility fix in ylong_runtime/src/task/join_set.rs for Rust 1.96 dangerous_implicit_autorefs lint.
Removed the workspace patch and vendored runtime source after the benchmark rejected the candidate.

verification_commands.output_summary: Cargo resolved ylong_runtime, ylong_io, and ylong_runtime_macros from ylong_http_client/vendor/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime during the temporary candidate test.
7 https_proxy_bench unit tests passed with the temporary vendored runtime candidate after the join_set compatibility fix.
Release benchmark binary built successfully with the temporary vendored runtime candidate.

verification_commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" python3 docs/benchmarks/run_https_proxy_bench.py --bench-bin /tmp/ylong-http-a2-target/release/https_proxy_bench --scenario https-over-https-proxy --requests 200,1000 --repeats 3 --warmup 50 --concurrency 8 --ylong-concurrency-model single-client --baseline libcurl --phase-timing --result-dir docs/benchmarks/results/a2-optimistic-readiness-candidate --figure-dir docs/benchmarks/results/a2-optimistic-readiness-candidate
verification_commands.output_summary: Focused phase-timing HTTPS-over-HTTPS-proxy matrix completed with zero request/protocol/TLS/proxy errors, but failed performance thresholds.

verification_commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" python3 docs/benchmarks/run_https_proxy_bench.py --bench-bin /tmp/ylong-http-a2-target/release/https_proxy_bench --scenario https-over-https-proxy --requests 200,1000 --repeats 3 --warmup 50 --concurrency 8 --ylong-concurrency-model single-client --baseline libcurl --result-dir docs/benchmarks/results/a2-optimistic-readiness-nonphase --figure-dir docs/benchmarks/results/a2-optimistic-readiness-nonphase
verification_commands.output_summary: Focused non-phase HTTPS-over-HTTPS-proxy matrix completed with zero request/protocol/TLS/proxy errors, but failed performance thresholds.

verification_commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ylong-http-a2-postrollback-target cargo tree --offline -p ylong_http_client --features async,http1_1,ylong_base,c_openssl_3_0,libcurl_bench -i ylong_runtime
verification_commands.output_summary: After rollback, Cargo resolved ylong_runtime from the original git pin https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git#0538ca7b, not from a vendored patch.

verification_commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_NET_OFFLINE=true CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ylong-http-a2-postrollback-target cargo test --offline -p ylong_http_client --features async,http1_1,ylong_base,c_openssl_3_0,libcurl_bench --bin https_proxy_bench -- --nocapture
verification_commands.output_summary: After rollback, 7 https_proxy_bench unit tests passed using the original git-pinned ylong_runtime dependency. Online final-state cargo verification had failed earlier only because gitee fetch timed out.

counterexample_gate_observation.summary: The optimistic poll_io pre-read candidate increased work on the measured nested TLS path instead of removing the bottleneck. Both phase and non-phase focused runs were below libcurl throughput geomean and regressed median latency, tail latency, CPU/request, and RSS in the 1000-request row.
counterexample_gate_observation.sota_effect: fails: throughput is below libcurl, p50/p95 ratios exceed hard limits, CPU and RSS regress, and no flagship threshold is reached.
counterexample_gate_observation.s9_effect: does not provide causal production performance evidence for a winning ylong_http_client HTTPS proxy path.

decision.next_action: Do not reintroduce readiness-before-wait optimistic I/O as a production/SOTA candidate. Continue A2 only with a different runtime/readiness hypothesis or with evidence that contradicts this counterexample.
